translations.en: "Thou hadst best speak to Lord British before aught else."
translations.zh: 「汝最好先去面見不列顛王陛下，餘事容後再議。」

translations.en: "I'm glad to see thee, $P. Perhaps thou canst prevail where others could not."
translations.zh: 「見汝甚悅，$P。或汝能成就他人未竟之績。」

translations.en: "I sent a party of ten to recapture the Shrine of Compassion from the gargoyles."
translations.zh: 「吾已遣十名兵卒，欲自魔像族手中奪回慈悲聖壇。」

translations.en: "The survivors are recuperating in the town of Cove."
translations.zh: 「生還者目下正在海灣鎮休養。」

translations.en: "Thou wouldst do well to speak with them first."
"Mayhap they learned something which might aid thee."
translations.zh: 「彼等所知，或可助汝一臂之力。」

translations.en: "I must confess I fear the worst."
"The gargoyles are such powerful foes, and they are spreading so fast..."
"Perhaps the end of the realm is nigh."
"Good luck, and my prayers go with thee."
translations.zh: 「祝汝武運昌隆，吾之祈禱與汝同行。」

translations.en: "Who knows what acts of villainy the gargoyles are comitting even as we speak?"*
translations.zh: 「天曉得，當此言之際，魔像族正在何處為非作歹？」*

translations.en: "I hope you've had a chance to visit Cove and speak with Gertan."
translations.zh: 「願汝已至海灣鎮，與葛爾坦一晤。」

translator_notes: Strict 重譯：(1) offset 11 縮短為 16 bytes (2) offset 128 避『許/功』5C trail (3) offset 430 避『許』。全 16 條 ≤ len，無 5C trail。
